content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's first move is a specific read of the smile (turn 2), naming a micro-expression and inquiring into it — a textbook 'distinguish the said from the shown' read that immediately changes the conversation. Turn 8 reads the linguistic caveat ('That sounds like I'm framing it as a trade-off I accepted') and reflects back the un-reframed truth before asking a question — read precedes question. Turn 10 tracks the rehearsing/contextualizing signature, naming the contextualization as the thing to stay before. Turn 12 catches the apology-as-deflection and names that the grief is still here — a precise somatic/affective read. The coach consistently tracks the intellectual-question-with-emotional-body pattern (the client's analytical register vs. the body underneath) and meets the resistance rather than fighting it. Reads are specific, timely, and operative — they shift the field each time. The coach also wisely refuses to take the IFS bait, which itself reflects a pattern-level read of construct-as-scaffolding.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the smile directly — a specific somatic/expressive read that opens the conversation. Read precedes inquiry."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Reframe more than read; doesn't name what he's noticing in the body, though the reframe is responsive to the over-mentalizing pattern."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Good question but no explicit read named; relies on content tracking."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the linguistic caveat ('that sounds like I'm framing it as a trade-off I accepted') and reflects the un-reframed truth before asking — read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks the contextualization signature in real time, invites him to stay before the reframe comes in."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the apology as deflection, names that the grief is still present — precise affective read that holds the field."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Stays with not-knowing; doesn't explicitly name a read but the move is grounded in tracking his pattern of generating frameworks."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "meet-resistance-with-okay"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-am-i", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift"],
  "notes": "Coach has not yet asked the awareness-locating 'what's you' question, but on the reads dimension specifically the work is consistently visible and timely."
}
